channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Drug Discovery Gets A Boost With AI
item.description: A partnership between Absci, AMD and Oracle is delivering promising results in closing the gap between the rate of drug discovery and bacterial/viral ...

item.title: Tesla dodges California license suspension after dropping misleading 'autopilot' marketing terms
item.description: Tesla avoids California license suspension after stopping "autopilot" use in marketing following state DMV order over misleading advertising practices...

item.title: Big Tech execs playing ‘Russian roulette’ in the AI arms race could risk human extinction, warns top researcher
item.description: Allowing companies free rein on AI is bringing on a new level of existential risk, Stuart Russell argues.

item.title: Federal judge rules on whether Buffalo Wild Wings can keep 'boneless wings' on menu
item.description: Federal judge dismisses Buffalo Wild Wings "boneless wings" lawsuit with pun-filled ruling, saying no reasonable consumer expects deboned wing meat.

item.title: Jake Paul says a chance meeting with Sam Altman at Trump’s inauguration led to an OpenAI investment and a crash course in ruthless 15-minute meetings
item.description: Paul said the OpenAI CEO showed him “time is the most valuable thing.”

item.title: Buffalo Wild Wings wins legal debate after a customer discovered his boneless wings contained no real wing meat at all
item.description: A judge ruled in favor of Buffalo Wild Wings for a March 2023 case, saying the customer’s argument “has no meat on its bones.”

item.title: Garmin Update Gives The Fenix 8 And Other Watches New Features
item.description: A Garmin update has started rolling out to the Fenix 8, Fenix E and Enduro 3, bringing new features as well as bug fixes and performance tweaks.

item.title: Masimo Founder Joe Kiani On The Healthtech Company’s $10 Billion Acquisition
item.description: In this week’s edition of InnovationRx, we look at Jennifer Doudna’s $1 billion plan to bring Crispr gene editing to the real world, using “boring” AI...

item.title: High flyer: Palantir CEO Alex Karp spent $17.2 million on private jets in 2025, filing reveals
item.description: One out of every 3.5 days was spent in the air for the Palantir CEO during 2025, filing shows.

item.title: Why AI Compute Pricing Remains Opaque Despite Massive Investment
item.description: Most GPU deals happen in secret. Nobody knows if they’re overpaying. And the risks are piling up faster than anyone realizes.

item.title: 3.4 Billion People Don’t Have Access To Mobile Internet, Costing The Global Economy $3 Trillion
item.description: A third of the world still doesn't have mobile internet. That's costing the global economy big, says the GSMA. Their solution: charging more for conte...

item.title: Mark Cuban slams the NBA for focusing on tanking and ignoring the real issue for fans: ‘It should worry more about pricing fans out of games’
item.description: The Dallas Mavericks, with Cuban as a stakeholder, raised prices nearly 9% ahead of the 2025-2026 season, despite fans’ ire over trading All-Star Luka...

item.title: Rent becoming more affordable for many Americans as market stabilizes
item.description: A housing market shift is giving renters more bargaining power as vacancy rates rise and median households spend 24.3% of income on rent, down from pa...

item.title: U.S. stocks giving back morning gains in final hour of trading — live
Economic calendar: Minutes from January Fed meeting due this afternoon
Trump economist Hassett says N.Y. Fed staff should be punished over tariff study
Amazon’s ‘underappreciated’ AI potential could drive the stock 50% higher
Fed minutes reveal discussion of a possible rate hike if inflation doesn’t cool
Trump touts potential 20% tax refunds from 'Big Beautiful Bill'
item.description: President Donald Trump said tax refunds could exceed 20% this year thanks to his "One Big Beautiful Bill," eliminating taxes on tips, Social Security ...

item.title: Texas capital’s household growth surges, far outpacing national rate
item.description: Austin's population boom spans all ages as NAR data shows young professionals and seniors driving household growth, creating diverse housing demand ac...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
